## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create dedicated settings subpages: Preferences, Security, Notifications
- Use mock data and local state persistence
- Add unsaved-changes guard for editable forms
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Section headers use Inter 600 with consistent 24px vertical spacing
  - Save bar fixed at bottom on mobile when form dirty
  - Toggle and select controls maintain 44px touch targets

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Settings subpages built and routed
- [ ] Unsaved changes warning implemented
- [ ] Mock persistence in local storage
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for each subpage and dirty/saved states

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `page-design`, `settings`, `priority-medium`
